questions.question: This fresh-faced singer and actress was best known for romantic comedies, and was an Academy Award nominee for Pillow Talk.
What popular children's toy was launched in 1967, allowing kids to create pictures with colored pegs on an illuminated console?
What single did Doris Day sing in the musical Calamity Jane that won the Academy Award for best song in 1953?
What alliance was signed in 1954 by the USSR and seven of its satellite countries?
Why would someone tell you to "think fast"?
questions.answer: Because they were throwing something at you
